applied_terms: “PHY”是标准术语，译为“物理层”或保留“PHY”。
“clock-gating”译为“时钟门控”，是标准译法。
“augment the efficiency mode”译为“增强效率模式”或“提升效率模式的效果”。
百分比数据（50%， 41%）的翻译需精确。

understanding.role_in_article: 深入探讨三星LPDDR6 PHY的具体节能技术，用数据量化其能效提升，作为对前文“其他问题”的可能解答或补充。

key_points: PHY通过门控非活动子通道的高速时钟路径来实现效率模式。
时钟门控技术使读写功耗降低近50%，待机功耗降低41%。
translation_notes: “PHY”是标准术语，译为“物理层”或保留“PHY”。
“clock-gating”译为“时钟门控”，是标准译法。
“augment the efficiency mode”译为“增强效率模式”或“提升效率模式的效果”。
百分比数据（50%， 41%）的翻译需精确。

issues.description: 术语“shoreline”的翻译“海岸线长度”在中文半导体语境中不够标准或常见。
译文在描述两个带宽密度时，重复使用了单位“/毫米”和“/平方毫米”，略显冗余。中文科技文献中常将单位前置以提升简洁性。
译文“进一步增强能效模式的效果”是准确的，但“augment”一词在技术语境下，译为“增强”或“提升”已足够。“效果”二字可省略，使表达更直接。

paragraphs.source: Samsung also unveiled PHYs on the logic die interface with LPDDR6. The PHYs are fabricated on their new SF2 process and support up to 14.4 Gb/s. The PHYs take up 2.32 mm of shoreline and 0.695 mm² of area, with bandwidth densities of 16.6 Gb/s/mm and 55.3 Gb/s/mm² respectively.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Samsung also unveiled PHYs on the logic die interface with LPDDR6. The PHYs are fabricated on their new SF2 process and support up to 14.4 Gb/s. The PHYs take up 2.32 mm of shoreline and 0.695 mm² of area, with bandwidth densities of 16.6 Gb/s/mm and 55.3 Gb/s/mm² respectively.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Samsung also unveiled PHYs on the logic die interface with LPDDR6. The PHYs are fabricated on their new SF2 process and support up to 14.4 Gb/s. The PHYs take up 2.32 mm of shoreline and 0.695 mm² of area, with bandwidth densities of 16.6 Gb/s/mm and 55.3 Gb/s/mm² respectively.

pro.text: 三星还展示了与 LPDDR6 接口的逻辑芯片上的物理层。这些物理层采用其全新的 SF2 工艺制造，最高支持 14.4 Gb/s 速率。其接口长度为 2.32 毫米，面积为 0.695 平方毫米，对应的带宽密度分别为每毫米 16.6 Gb/s 和每平方毫米 55.3 Gb/s。

paragraphs.source: The PHYs also support the efficiency mode implemented by the LPDDR6 chips, which can reduce read power by 39% and write power by 29%.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The PHYs also support the efficiency mode implemented by the LPDDR6 chips, which can reduce read power by 39% and write power by 29%.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The PHYs also support the efficiency mode implemented by the LPDDR6 chips, which can reduce read power by 39% and write power by 29%.

pro.text: 这些物理层也支持 LPDDR6 芯片实现的能效模式，该模式可将读取功耗降低 39%，写入功耗降低 29%。

“clock-gating”译为“时钟门控”，是标准译法。

paragraphs.source: The PHYs can augment the efficiency mode by gating the high-speed clock path for the inactive secondary sub-channel. With clock-gating, the power reduction reaches almost 50% for reading and writing, and idle power is reduced by 41%.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The PHYs can augment the efficiency mode by gating the high-speed clock path for the inactive secondary sub-channel. With clock-gating, the power reduction reaches almost 50% for reading and writing, and idle power is reduced by 41%.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The PHYs can augment the efficiency mode by gating the high-speed clock path for the inactive secondary sub-channel. With clock-gating, the power reduction reaches almost 50% for reading and writing, and idle power is reduced by 41%.

pro.text: 物理层还能通过门控非活跃的次子通道的高速时钟路径，来增强这一能效模式。结合时钟门控技术，读写功耗降低幅度接近 50%，空闲功耗则可降低 41%。

“clock-gating”译为“时钟门控”，是标准译法。
